scripts.update-data: npm run update-hdi && npm run update-population && npm run fetch-data
scripts.device: source .env.local && vite build && npx cap copy ios && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination "id=$IOS_DEVICE_UDID" -derivedDataPath ios/DerivedData COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO build && xcrun devicectl device install app --device $IOS_DEVICE_ID ios/DerivedData/Build/Products/Debug-iphoneos/App.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --terminate-existing --device $IOS_DEVICE_ID $IOS_BUNDLE_ID
scripts.device:live: source .env.local && LIVE_RELOAD=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):5173 npx cap copy ios && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination "id=$IOS_DEVICE_UDID" -derivedDataPath ios/DerivedData COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO build && xcrun devicectl device install app --device $IOS_DEVICE_ID ios/DerivedData/Build/Products/Debug-iphoneos/App.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --terminate-existing --device $IOS_DEVICE_ID $IOS_BUNDLE_ID
scripts.device:android: source .env.local && vite build && npx cap copy android && (cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug) && "$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb" -s "$ANDROID_DEVICE_ID" install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && "$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb" -s "$ANDROID_DEVICE_ID" shell monkey -p com.exploris.app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
scripts.device:android:live: source .env.local && LIVE_RELOAD=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):5173 npx cap copy android && (cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug) && "$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb" -s "$ANDROID_DEVICE_ID" install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && "$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb" -s "$ANDROID_DEVICE_ID" shell monkey -p com.exploris.app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
scripts.device:android:cable: vite build && npx cap copy android && (cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug) && "$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb" -d install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && "$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb" -d shell monkey -p com.exploris.app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
scripts.device:android:cable:live: LIVE_RELOAD=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):5173 npx cap copy android && (cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug) && "$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb" -d install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && "$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb" -d shell monkey -p com.exploris.app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
